mapper.select: SELECT pi.leader_id FROM project_info pi INNER JOIN project_achievement pa ON pi.id = pa.project_id WHERE pa.id = #{achievementId}

SELECT pa.id, pa.project_id AS projectId, pa.submitter_id AS submitterId, u.real_name AS submitterName, pa.title, pa.achievement_type AS achievementType, pa.file_url AS fileUrl, pa.status, pa.create_time AS createTime FROM project_achievement pa LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pa.submitter_id = u.id WHERE pa.project_id = #{projectId} AND pa.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY pa.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_achievement pa WHERE pa.project_id = #{projectId} AND pa.is_deleted = 0
